scoringPlays.text: Brett Seither 2 Yd pass from Haynes King (Gavin Stewart Kick)
Trey Cooley 1 Yd Run (Gavin Stewart Kick)
Kevin Coleman 9 Yd pass from Jack Plummer (Brock Travelstead Kick)
Trey Cooley 23 Yd Run (Gavin Stewart Kick)
Chase Lane 48 Yd pass from Haynes King (Gavin Stewart Kick)
Jamari Thrash 5 Yd pass from Jack Plummer (Brock Travelstead Kick)
Jamari Thrash 20 Yd pass from Jack Plummer (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)
Jawhar Jordan 74 Yd Run (Brock Travelstead Kick)
Eric Singleton Jr. 5 Yd pass from Haynes King (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)

videos.headline: Georgia Tech's fumble results in 74-yard Louisville TD
videos.description: Louisville forces a fumble on Haynes King, and on the next play Jawhar Jordan runs for a 74-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech's fumble results in 74-yard Louisville TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Louisville intercepts Haynes King on 1st drive
videos.description: Louisville's Ramon Puryear intercepts Georgia Tech's QB Haynes King on the first drive of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville intercepts Haynes King on 1st drive) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King completes first TD pass as a Yellow Jacket
videos.description: Haynes King passes to Brett Seither to give Georgia Tech the lead against Louisville.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King completes first TD pass as a Yellow Jacket) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trey Cooley rushes into end zone for a TD
videos.description: Trey Cooley rushes through defenders to score a Yellow Jackets TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trey Cooley rushes into end zone for a TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Coleman stiff-arms defender, dives to pylon for Louisville TD
videos.description: Jack Plummer passes to Kevin Coleman for a 9-yard Louisville touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Coleman stiff-arms defender, dives to pylon for Louisville TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chase Lane tip-toes down the line for a 48-yard TD
videos.description: Chase Lane shows off speed for a 48-yard Georgia Tech touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chase Lane tip-toes down the line for a 48-yard TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Louisville makes it a one-posession game with a TD
videos.description: Jack Plummer passes to Jamari Thrash for a 5-yard Louisville touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville makes it a one-posession game with a TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamari Thrash gives the Cardinals the lead with a TD
videos.description: Jamari Thrash scores his second touchdown of the game on a 20-yard reception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jamari Thrash gives the Cardinals the lead with a TD) 2023/09/01 ESHEET
